overview: Campus Connect is a mobile-style web app for students to access campus services — order food from the campus food court, print documents at the book mart, book event seats, track orders and queue positions, and manage their profile. Features 11 polished screens with a blue/green theme and static demo data throughout.
features: Student and Vendor login with card-style UI
Student dashboard with service navigation cards
Food Court with add-to-cart, availability badges, and floating cart
Cart with quantity controls and real-time price total
Order confirmation with QR code placeholder and pickup time
Book Mart with file upload mock, print options, and price estimator
Event Booking with seat grid selection
Notifications list with order and event alerts
Queue Status with position and wait time indicator
Profile with order history and logout
